name: AstroPrerna

longDescription:

This is a powerful astrology app.

name: Focus App
shortDesc: Stay productive with smart focus sessions. Block distractions, set goals, and track your deep work time effortlessly.
longDescription: Stay productive with smart focus sessions. Block distractions, set goals, and track your deep work time effortlessly.

name: Quick Scan
shortDesc: Instantly scan documents, IDs, and receipts with your camera. Export clean PDFs with a single tap.
longDescription: Instantly scan documents, IDs, and receipts with your camera. Export clean PDFs with a single tap.

name: Photo Editor
shortDesc: A powerful yet simple photo editing tool. Adjust, enhance, and beautify your images right on your Android phone.
